content.mainTitle: Free YouTube to MP4 Downloader - Fast, HD & No Ads
content.intro1: This YouTube to MP4 downloader by Y2mate is a specialized online tool designed to convert and save YouTube videos in high-definition MP4 format directly to your device. If you've ever wanted to grab a tutorial for a long flight or save a high-quality music video for a road trip without relying on a shaky data connection, this is your go-to solution. It's built to be fast, free, and—most importantly—clean of those annoying ads and redirects that plague other sites.
content.intro2: Whether you need a lightweight 144p file to save space or a crisp 1080p Full HD version for your home theater, this tool handles the conversion in the cloud so your device doesn't have to. No software, no accounts, just pure MP4 downloads.

instructions.title: How to Convert YouTube to MP4 in Seconds
steps: Copy & Paste: Grab the YouTube URL and paste it into the converter box above.
Select MP4: Click "Start" and our system will instantly list all available MP4 resolutions.
Choose Quality: Pick the resolution that fits your needs—from data-friendly 144p to crystal-clear 1080p HD.
Instant Save: Hit "Convert" and then "Download." Your video is now ready for offline viewing on any device!

whyChoose.title: Why This MP4 Converter Stands Out
reasons: Safe & Ad-Free Experience: We've stripped away the pop-ups and redirects. You get a secure, streamlined process from start to finish.
Original HD Quality: If the creator uploaded it in 1080p, you can download it in 1080p. We don't compress your quality unless you ask us to.
Zero Storage Impact: Since this is a pure web-based tool, you don't need to install any "MP4 Downloader" apps or browser plugins.
Universal Playback: Our MP4 files are optimized to play perfectly on VLC, Windows Media Player, QuickTime, and even Smart TVs or gaming consoles.

items.title: Unlimited MP4 Conversions
items.description: There are no daily caps. Convert an entire playlist's worth of videos if you need to!

items.title: Fast Cloud Processing
items.description: Our servers handle the heavy lifting, meaning your MP4 is ready for download in just a few heartbeats.

items.title: Battery-Friendly
items.description: Because the conversion happens on our side, it won't drain your phone's battery or heat up your laptop.

items.title: Cross-Device Ready
items.description: Perfectly compatible with Chrome, Safari, Edge, and Firefox on both Mobile and Desktop.

items.title: Multiple Resolutions
items.description: 144p, 360p, 480p, 720p (HD), 1080p (Full HD) - choose the resolution that fits your needs.

items.title: Universal Compatibility
items.description: Works seamlessly on iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, Linux and all modern browsers.

items.question: Is this YouTube to MP4 tool free?
items.answer: Yes, it is completely free to use. We don't have hidden "premium" tiers or file size limits. You get the full HD experience for $0.

items.question: How do I save the MP4 directly to my iPhone or Android?
items.answer: On Android, it saves directly to your Downloads folder. On iPhone, use Safari to download, then tap the "Downloads" icon in the search bar and select "Save Video" to move it to your Photos app.

items.question: Why should I choose MP4 over other formats?
items.answer: MP4 is the "universal" format. It offers the best balance between high video quality and small file size, making it compatible with almost every phone, tablet, and TV in existence.

items.question: Can I download 1080p videos with sound?
items.answer: Absolutely. Unlike many other tools that give you 1080p without audio, our converter merges them automatically so you get a complete High-Definition file.

items.question: What if the video I want is Private?
items.answer: For security and privacy reasons, our tool can only convert "Public" or "Unlisted" videos. If a video is set to "Private" by the owner, it cannot be processed.
